entity.name: Damián Ferraro
entity.description: Fundador y desarrollador de Honguera, plataforma open hardware para cultivo fúngico de precisión. Experiencia en IoT, firmware ESP32, automatización, arquitectura de sistemas y proyectos FOSS.

projects.name: Honguera
projects.description: Honguera is an open hardware platform for precision fungal cultivation. It uses ESP32 microcontrollers, environmental sensors (temperature, humidity, CO₂), MQTT telemetry, InfluxDB, Grafana dashboards, and Node-RED automation to monitor and control growth chambers for edible mushrooms. The entire system is open source: hardware designs (CERN-OHL-S), firmware (GPLv3), data stack, and species-specific environmental profiles. It aims to make controlled-environment agriculture accessible to small producers, technical schools, and bio-entrepreneurs in the Global South.

plans.description: Funding to mature Honguera from a functional proof-of-concept (TRL 3-4) to a reproducible, validated platform (TRL 5). The next phase includes PCB design, multi-node validation, environmental telemetry, species profile refinement, documentation, and a first pilot with real producers or technical schools.
